Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class RecommendationStrategy

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.RecommendationStrategy
public class RecommendationStrategy extends Metadata

Java class for RecommendationStrategy complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="RecommendationStrategy">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="actionContext" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyAction" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="contextRecordType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filter" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeFilter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="if" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeIf" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="invocableAction" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeInvocableAction" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="map" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeMap" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mutuallyExclusive" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeExclusive" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="onBehalfOfExpression" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recommendationLimit" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeRecommendationLimit" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recommendationLoad" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeRecommendationLoad" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sort" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeSort" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="union" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}StrategyNodeUnion" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getActionContext

      public List<StrategyAction> getActionContext()
      Gets the value of the actionContext property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the actionContext property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getActionContext().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list StrategyAction

      Returns:
      The value of the actionContext property.

    • getContextRecordType

      public String getContextRecordType()
      Gets the value of the contextRecordType property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

      Sets the value of the contextRecordType property.
